summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Pinnacle.AI Phases 5-9 implementation. All backend APIs and frontend pages are functional with correct branding and features.

minor_issues.issue: One API call returned 520 error during determinism test
minor_issues.impact: Minor - likely external service issue, core functionality works

passed_tests: Health endpoint returns Pinnacle.AI branding and version 1.0.0
Advanced Audit (Phase 5) - explainability structure with contributing_factors, penalties, evidence
Advanced Audit - audit_integrity with deterministic=true and scoring_version
Advanced Audit - historical_intelligence data structure
AI Content Compiler (Phase 6) - returns compilation_readiness, semantic_breakdown, total_blocks
Strategy Simulator (Phase 7) - addFAQ strategy shows positive improvement delta
Strategy Simulator - addSchema strategy returns valid simulation
Strategy Simulator - invalid strategy returns 400 error
Security headers present: X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, X-XSS-Protection, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy
Enterprise sensitivity test with authorityFocused mode returns different probability with authority weight 0.4
Enterprise sensitivity test with invalid mode returns 400 error
Enterprise competitor comparison returns ranking_order, score_comparison, gap_analysis
Enterprise executive summary returns overall_health, key_weaknesses, highest_impact_improvement, competitive_standing
Frontend: Sidebar shows 'Pinnacle.AI' branding correctly
Frontend: Login page shows 'Pinnacle.AI' branding
Frontend: Advanced Audit page loads with Phase 5 label and functional form
Frontend: Strategy Simulator page loads with Phase 7 label and functional form
Frontend: Competitor Intelligence page loads with Phase 9 label and functional form
Frontend: Executive Summary page loads with Phase 9 label and displays health data
Frontend: All new pages integrate properly with backend APIs
